case_title: WROOLIE & LOPRESTI INC. VS JAMES SWAN INTERIOR DESIGN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $495.00 FILED BY WROOLIE & LOPRESTI INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES SWAN INTERIOR DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WROOLIE & LOPRESTI INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES SWAN INTERIOR DESIGN $495.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WROOLIE & LOPRESTI INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF AUG-22-1994, GRANTED
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JAMES SWAN RETURNED SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES SWAN INTERIOR DESIGN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JAMES SWAN RETURNED SIGNED
